defs: The quality or state of being variant; change of condition; variation.
Difference that produces dispute or controversy; disagreement; dissension; discord; dispute; quarrel.
quotes: That which is the strength of their amity shall prove the immediate author of their variance.

defs: A disagreement or difference between two parts of the same legal proceeding, which, to be effectual, ought to agree, -- as between the writ and the declaration, or between the allegation and the proof.
The expected value of the square of the deviation from the mean of a randomly distributed variable; the second moment about the mean. This is also the square of the standard deviation.
